title: Scalable Items
description: Allows you to customize your held item size to whatever you want!
body:
If you want to suggest anything, report a bug, or vote on future packs, then [join my discord](https://discord.gg/gymTft2GbV)

This resource pack utilizes [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) to allow you to customize the sizes of your items ingame! This will make it easier to pvp since they aren't all up in your face. Note that this doesn't affect items in 3rd person, which means that you can still tell what other people are holding!

If you would like more screenshots of how this looks / works, go to [the gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/size/gallery)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48641c76c4f0bb72084dcdb9329a8ace9737fb86.png)

https://www.alphaleo.li/resourcepacks
